testcase.name: test_multichip_decoder_perf[blackhole-mesh_device0-device_params0]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/ttnn/cpp/ttnn/operations/experimental/paged_cache/device/fill_cache/paged_fill_cache_device_operation.cpp:45: input_tensor.dtype() == cache_tensor.dtype() info: Input tensor dtype (DataType::BFLOAT16) must match cache tensor dtype (DataType::BFLOAT8_B) for paged_fill_cache; cast prefill K/V to the cache dtype before filling the paged cache. backtrace: --- /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/build_Release/lib/_ttnncpp.so(+0x7585f8) [0x7d6af19585f8] --- testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices)
@_mesh_test def test_multichip_decoder_perf(mesh_device): if os.environ.get("RUN_MULTICHIP_DECODER_PERF") != "1": pytest.skip("set RUN_MULTICHIP_DECODER_PERF=1 to run warmed multichip timing") config = _config() seq_len = int(os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_DECODER_PERF_SEQ", config.sliding_window)) repeats = int(os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_DECODER_PREFILL_REPEATS", "10")) trace_replays = int(os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_DECODER_TRACE_REPLAYS", "100")) reference_path = _perf_reference_path(seq_len) assert reference_path.exists(), "capture the isolated single-chip timing first" baseline = json.loads(reference_path.read_text()) multichip_config, qkv_candidate = _perf_multichip_config_from_env() optimization_config = _perf_optimization_config_from_env(multichip_config) decoder = _decoder( _real_state_dict(), config, mesh_device, max_cache_len=max(128, seq_len + 1), multichip_config=multichip_config, optimization_config=optimization_config, ) page_table = decoder.create_page_table() generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(9191) prefill_hidden = torch.randn(1, seq_len, config.hidden_size, generator=generator).to(torch.bfloat16) decode_hidden = torch.randn(1, 1, config.hidden_size, generator=generator).to(torch.bfloat16) > prefill_ms, key_cache, value_cache = _time_prefill( decoder, mesh_device, prefill_hidden, repeats=repeats, label=f"MULTICHIP_{multichip_config.expert_strategy.upper()}", page_table=page_table, )
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:1350: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:1226: in _time_prefill decoder.prefill_forward(tt_hidden, **kwargs) models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tt/tp2_multichip_decoder.py:954: in prefill_forward hidden_states = self._prefill_attention(hidden_states, key_cache, value_cache, page_table, seq_len) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tt/tp2_multichip_decoder.py:552: in _prefill_attention ttnn.experimental.paged_fill_cache(key_cache, key, page_table, batch_idx=0) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = FastOperation(python_fully_qualified_name='ttnn.experimental.paged_fill_cache', function=<ttnn._ttnn.operations.experi...uts=None, golden_function=None, postprocess_golden_function_outputs=None, is_cpp_operation=True, is_experimental=False) function_args = (device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000], [ 0.00...ate([0, 3]) ttnn.Tensor([[ 0, 1, 2]], shape=Shape([1, 3]), dtype=DataType::INT32, layout=Layout::ROW_MAJOR)) function_kwargs = {'batch_idx': 0}, cq_id = None, recording = False
def __call__(self, *function_args, **function_kwargs): cq_id = None if "queue_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("queue_id") elif "cq_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("cq_id")
recording = ttnn.graph.is_python_io_recording_enabled() if recording: ttnn.graph.track_function_start(self.python_fully_qualified_name) ttnn.graph.record_python_operation(self.python_fully_qualified_name, function_args, function_kwargs) input_tensors = get_all_tensors((function_args, function_kwargs)) set_tensor_id(input_tensors)
try: if cq_id is None: > result = self.function(*function_args, **function_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/ttnn/cpp/ttnn/operations/experimental/paged_cache/device/fill_cache/paged_fill_cache_device_operation.cpp:45: input_tensor.dtype() == cache_tensor.dtype() E info: E Input tensor dtype (DataType::BFLOAT16) must match cache tensor dtype (DataType::BFLOAT8_B) for paged_fill_cache; cast prefill K/V to the cache dtype before filling the paged cache.
